items.title: Special Meeting: Council goal setting for 2026-2027 term and Council/City Staff work process
items.summary: The City Council held a Special Meeting facilitated by the City Manager and Mayor to set 3-5 goals for the 2026-2027 council term, reviewing which 2024/2025 goals have been achieved, need modification, or are no longer relevant. The session also covered a structured discussion with City Staff about Policy Orders/Awaiting Reports, use of committees, and constituent services. A 25-minute public comment window was scheduled at the start of the meeting.
items.body:
Special Meeting of the City Council on Tuesday, January 27, 2026, at 9:00 am in the Sullivan Chamber, Cambridge City Hall, 795 Massachusetts Ave. Cambridge MA. to discuss Goal Setting for the 2026-2027 council term and City Council / City Staff work process.

Agenda:
9:00-9:05 Welcome and desired outcomes for the session (City Manager and Mayor)
9:05-9:30 Public Comment (Mayor)
9:30-11:00 In a large group, discuss: (1) Which of these 2024/2025 goals have been achieved and therefore should come off the list for 2026/2027? (2) Which of these 2024/2025 goals need to be modified to reflect progress made, but not completion? (3) Which of these 2024/2025 goals are no longer relevant? (4) What goals should be added for 2026/2027 if any? (5) Review and agree on 3-5 goals for 2026/2027 (Facilitator)
11:00-11:15 Break
11:15-12:45 Council and City Staff discuss what's working well and what needs to be adjusted/improved? Yi-An to offer updates and status on the below 3 topics followed by conversation with the full group: (1) Policy Orders/Awaiting Reports, (2) Use of Committees, (3) Constituent Services (City Manager/Facilitator)
12:45-1:00 Closing (City Manager and Mayor)

history.action: Special Meeting held; all 9 councillors present (Al-Zubi remote, Azeem in person at 9:25 AM, Flaherty in person at 9:27 AM, others in person)
